steps.title: Distribute to each term
steps.content:
Multiply $4xy$ by both terms inside the parentheses. This keeps the $x$ and $y$ factors attached to each product.
$$4xy(3x^2)+4xy(5y)$$

steps.title: Simplify the products
steps.content:
Multiply coefficients and combine matching variable factors. The first product gains another two powers of $x$, and the second product gains another factor of $y$.
$$4xy\cdot3x^2=12x^3y$$
$$4xy\cdot5y=20xy^2$$

steps.title: Write the equivalent expression
steps.content: The expanded expression is $12x^3y+20xy^2$. The answer is D.
